01-why-workflows-matter.instruction: List 3 manual workflows that are repetitive, error-prone, or time-consuming. Describe each and why it's painful.
01-why-workflows-matter.successMessage: Identifying pain is step one. These 3 are your first automation targets.

02-mapping-your-processes.instruction: Pick one painful workflow and map it step by step. Include trigger, each action, decision points, end result. Use arrows.
02-mapping-your-processes.successMessage: Process mapping reveals hidden complexity and automation opportunities.

03-trigger-based-workflows.instruction: Design 3 trigger-based automations. Each: clear trigger, conditions, and 2-3 automated actions.
03-trigger-based-workflows.successMessage: Three automations that run while you sleep.

04-data-flow-design.instruction: Design data flow for a form submission routing to the right team. Show data captured, transformations, and destinations.
04-data-flow-design.successMessage: Clean data flow prevents the #1 automation bug: wrong format, wrong place.

05-error-handling-and-fallbacks.instruction: Your invoice workflow fails halfway: invoice created but email didn't send. Design the error handling.
05-error-handling-and-fallbacks.successMessage: Error handling separates demo automations from production systems.

06-human-in-the-loop.instruction: Design a workflow where AI does heavy lifting but humans approve critical steps. Define what's autonomous vs needs approval.
06-human-in-the-loop.successMessage: The best workflows augment humans, not replace them.

07-integration-patterns.instruction: Write a prompt for Claude to recommend integration patterns connecting your CRM, email, and PM tools. Include specific tools and sync needs.
07-integration-patterns.successMessage: Integration architecture is the backbone of modern workflows.

08-testing-workflows.instruction: Create a test plan: 3 happy path tests, 2 edge cases, 1 failure scenario. For each, define input and expected output.
08-testing-workflows.successMessage: Testing before go-live prevents the 2 AM panic.

09-monitoring-and-maintenance.instruction: Design a monitoring dashboard for automated workflows. Metrics to track, alerts to set, healthy vs unhealthy indicators.
09-monitoring-and-maintenance.successMessage: You can't manage what you can't measure.

10-your-workflow-portfolio.instruction: Create your Workflow Portfolio: 5 workflows ordered by impact. Each: name, trigger, what it automates, time saved/week.
10-your-workflow-portfolio.successMessage: A prioritized portfolio is a roadmap to operational freedom.
